checkin.journal:
Grateful for: This new day being a bit more relaxed, Cosita family friends ❤️❤️❤️, This amazing place where I can get food, I get everything, like honestly, this year is a full service, The only thing that is missing as every year is sleep
Today great: Just relaxing and practising my speech and meeting the colleagues. 
Affirmation: I'm patient and I'm worthy of love. 
Amazing things: I met with the guys from Support, it was really such a pleasant meeting
Better: Maybe I ate too late. Maybe this

supplements_list.name: mg glycinate 1 capsule (probably wont take it more)
